name: Dr Alexander Mikhalev
role: CTO & Head of AI, Zestic AI
tagline: An experienced technical leader and innovator with a focus on data, engineering, AI and ML
bio: An experienced technical leader and innovator with a focus on data, engineering, AI and ML. Capable of taking innovation from idea to production by building a complete platform with a whole lifecycle and corresponding organisation. Deep knowledge in AI/ML, data privacy, synthetic data, distributed data, natural language processing, search engines, sensors, and wired/wireless networks. Key positions include AI lead architect at Nationwide, UK Ministry of Defence, and CTO & Head of AI at Zestic AI.

education.course: MSc (Engineer) in Information Systems and Computer Science
education.institution: Moscow State Technical University n/a Bauman (MSTU), Russia
